title: Eye of Palpatine
content:

Corporation]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] **''[[Blue Shuttle]]'' **''[[Red Shuttle]]'' *[[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat]]s |bays= |escapepods= |crew=Unmanned |skeleton= |passengers=Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables=90 [[Standard day/Legends|days]] {{C|estimated}} |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=[[Dreadnaught/Legends|Dreadnaught]] |commission= |destroyed=[[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] |retired= |battles= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |navy=[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |fleet= |owners=[[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|The biggest, most dangerous, most secret vessel of them all, a supership, a dreadnaught, a battlemoon. One the enemy wouldn't see coming until it was too late.|[[Triv Pothman]]|}} The '''''Eye of Palpatine''''' was a [[Dreadnaught/Legends|dreadnaught]] constructed by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at the behest of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]]. It was designed by [[Ohran Keldor]] as the Empire's first functional [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] while resembling an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] as a means of camouflage. ==Description== {{Quote|Huge, more vast than even the biggest of the Super Star Destroyers, bigger than a torpedo sphere, with firepower to waste a planet.|Luke Skywalker's thoughts on the ''Eye of Palpatine''|}} [[File:Gamorreans_Eye_of_Palpatine.jpg|thumb|left|160px|[[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] on board the ''Eye of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]'']] The deadly [[Warship/Legends|warship]] was one of the Galactic Empire's first functional [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. It was referred to as both a dreadnought and a battlemoon. As part of its secretive origin, the vessel was made to look like an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]], including impact craters created with Palpatine's direct input. The official reason for this was to evade detection by enemy vessels and worlds, although some speculated it was done to keep its development a secret due to potential outrage, or possibly because it was converted from a large space rock in order to save on material resources. Akin to a [[Torpedo Sphere/Legends|Torpedo Sphere]], the ''Eye'' was larger and more heavily armed. Its firepower rivaled and possibly exceeded that of an entire fleet carrying out a [[Base Delta Zero/Legends|Base Delta Zero]]–type orbital bombardment; that is, it could reduce the upper crust of a planet to molten slag using only its own weaponry. Its overall size surpassed that of several [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyers]], although its length was on par with the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnoughts]] and the [[Vengeance-class dreadnought|''Vengeance''-class dreadnoughts]]. The bridge was located at the bow of the vessel. A [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]–style tower on the dorsal area of the ship was included solely as a [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector-shield]] generator. Another deflector-shield generator was located near the stern, on the ship's ventral side. The vessel had at least one sensor array, visible on the bow as a large crater. It possessed at least eight hangar bays, close to the stern; at least one of them was on an area where the ship's metallic hull was exposed. At least six sublight engines propelled the vessel, one near the dorsal side and two near the ventral side of the stern. The [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] was located in the equatorial area of the vessel's stern. Its weaponry included at least four sets of ventral turbolaser batteries, a ring of eight forward-focused turbolaser batteries, and its primary weapon, a laser targeting beam emitter, located at the center of the forward-focused turbolaser battery ring. The main bridge was located directly above the targeting beam emitter, as well as the topmost turbolaser battery. To maintain secrecy, the ship was unmanned, and all its systems were controlled by an [[Artificial intelligence/Legends|artificial intelligence]] known as [[the Will]]. The ship was equipped with many [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] as well as [[Beta-class ETR-3 escort transport|''Beta''-class ETR-3 escort transports]] and [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray Blastboats]]. Much of the ship's onboard equipment was supplied by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. ==History== {{Quote|Looking at the kind of thing he designed later—military and industrial both—I'd say the Emperor paid him to design a supership of some kind. That was back when they needed a vessel the size of a city to carry the blasting power they wanted. Whatever was on Belsavis, it looks like the Emperor didn't want anything breathing when the dust settled.|[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] on Keldor's involvement|}} The dreadnaught was designed by [[Ohran Keldor]], who also had a hand in the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] project. Palpatine had the ''Eye'' constructed in 18 BBY, via government funds that he had diverted, and he intended to use it to destroy [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis's]] [[Plawal Rift]], where the [[Children of the Jedi]] were being sheltered by the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Plett]] at the time. This rift was a lush, steam-filled geothermal vent gouged into the planet's icy wastes and covered by a [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] dome. Since this action would have caused outrage in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]], he scattered the vessel's contingent of troops across the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] to await pickup. The ship also was made to resemble an asteroid, even including impact craters, as a means of camouflage. Officially, the camouflage was implemented to either deceive or baffle scanners from enemy worlds and vessels, although later historians speculated that the real reason was to keep its development a secret from the Imperial Senate, due largely to Palpatine having already ordered for the commencement of the Death Star project by the time he ordered the construction of the dreadnought. The ship was constructed at the shipyards of [[Rothana/Legends|Rothana]] and at [[Patriim shipyards|Patriim]], where it was activated and sent to Belsavis to destroy the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. Scheduled to fly along lightly traveled hyperlanes, it would pick up contingents of troops at [[Pzob/Legends|Pzob]], [[Dom-Bradden]], [[Kirdo III/Legends|Kirdo III]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and [[Alzoc III/Legends|Alzoc III]]. Despite the secrecy attempts, two [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]], [[Geith Eris]] and [[Callista Ming]], found out about it and sabotage the vessel in the [[Moonflower Nebula/Legends|Moonflower Nebula]]. Callista was forced to trap her spirit in the ship's computers in order to stop it. Plett and the children of the Jedi were able to leave Belsavis and escape as a result of Geith's and Callista's heroic act. The Emperor, furious at the failure of his plans, imprisoned several people for the loss of the ''Eye''. ===Later service=== {{Quote|We've heard all about this ship, what is it? Where is it coming from? Are you sure it's large enough to give us the power, the armament, to create our own Allied Fleet?''"
"''It is, quite simply, the largest and most heavily armored battlemoon still in existence from the heyday of the Imperial Fleet, it was the prototype transition between the torpedo platforms and the original Death Star. It doesn't have the focused power of the destructor beams, but it has almost the power capacity of the Death Star…|Lord Vensell Picutorion and Irek Ismaren|}} [[File:Luke_Skywalker_Eye_of_Palpatine.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] on the ''Eye of Palpatine'' fighting brainwashed [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]]]] The ''Eye'' remained dormant and lost until [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], when the [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda Ismaren]] located it. She used her son [[Irek Ismaren]]—who had been implanted with a sub-electronic converter that allowed him to control any machine by thought—to "summon" the dormant ship to Belsavis in [[Ismaren plot|her attempt]] to revitalize the Empire. Upon activation, the ''Eye of Palpatine'' attempted to fulfill its programming by picking up its Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] contingent. But, due to the Empire's collapse, the troops had disappeared, except for [[Triv Pothman]], one of 45 troopers left on the [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] colony Pzob, who survived the bloodshed brought on by the various warring Gamorrean tribes. Undaunted, the ''Eye'' went after any sentient beings found in the appropriate locations. It began grabbing groups of prisoners from various species located on the enlisted worlds. Soon the ''Eye'' was filled with numerous species including [[Talz/Legends|Talz]], [[Affytechan]]s, [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]], [[Kitonak/Legends|Kitonaks]], [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]], [[Tripod]]s, and Gamorreans. They were all brainwashed into thinking they were Imperial stormtroopers. The ''Eye'' was eventually destroyed by Jedi student [[Nichos Marr/Legends|Nichos Marr]] over Belsavis. Although no evidence could be found in any of the surviving Imperial records recovered by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Qwi Xux]] believed that the ''Eye'' had a sister ship; that ship's mission or final fate, if it even existed, had not been discovered as of [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' ==Appearances==
